calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:45am
Judge Bruce Lubarsky, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Radius, does not appear. Respondent, Compass Accounting appears through Rachael Wall. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lubarsky.

Rachael Wall of Compass Accounting advises clerk of new address in open court. Clerk requests that Ms. Wall file a change of address in room 103.

9:46am
Appeal is dismissed.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Judgment Entered
